name: Vladislav Dragan
damage_resistances: necrotic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

special_abilities.name: Shapechanger
special_abilities.desc: Can use action to polymorph into a bat, wolf, or mist.

special_abilities.name: Regeneration
special_abilities.desc: Regains 20 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight or running water.

special_abilities.name: Spider Climb
special_abilities.desc: Can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings.

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Hypersensitivity
special_abilities.desc: Takes 20 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks in sunlight.

actions.name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
actions.desc: Makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.

actions.name: Unarmed Strike
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage. Instead of dealing damage, can grapple the target (escape DC 18).

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken.

actions.name: Charm
actions.desc: Targets one humanoid within 30 ft. DC 17 Wisdom save or be charmed for 24 hours. While charmed, regards Vladislav as a trusted friend.

legendary_actions.name: Move
legendary_actions.desc: Vladislav moves up to his speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary_desc: Vladislav can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below.
